penalties.description: Deviation observed inside the marked circle during cutting.

consensus_score.reasoning: GPT-4o detected task completion with circle_release phase while Claude did not observe final separation. Given GPT's detection of the complete circle release and final product visibility, the task was completed. A line deviation penalty was applied as observed by GPT-4o during the cutting process.

disagreements.rationale: GPT-4o detected task completion at circle_release phase while Claude stopped timing before observing final separation

claude_value.description: The marked circle was not completely cut out by the end of the visible frames - final release of the cut piece was not observed.

gpt_value.description: Deviation observed inside the marked circle during cutting.

disagreements.rationale: GPT-4o observed complete task execution including circle_release phase, negating the incomplete_circle penalty. Line deviation penalty retained as observed during cutting process
